stories.headline: Turkish police evict ousted opposition leaders from party headquarters

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Turkish riot police fired tear gas and forced their way into the main opposition party's headquarters to evict its ousted leadership, deepening a crisis at the heart of Turkey's democracy

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Erdogan just being corrupt as fuck once again. He wants his Islamist dictatorship to be permanent. Turkey will end up like every other country where Islamic extremists eliminated any kind of opposition and killed democracy.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Yesterday, Özgür Özel, leader of Turkey’s main opposition party, removed from his role through a decision widely seen as driven by Erdoğan’s grip on the judiciary, marched to Parliament in Ankara under the rain. ... Erdoğan is choking democratic choice.

The new Huberman Lab episode is out: Build Muscle, Great Posture & Resilience to Injury | Jeff Cavaliere
0:00 Jeff Cavaliere
2:43 Lower Back, Back Pain

Includes paid partnerships.

stories.headline: Huberman elaborates on small daily exercises for posture and strength from new episode.
stories.body: The small things everyone should do at every age to ensure you can do the big things that really move the needle for the health and longevity of your body. And directly improve your posture and make you stronger too. @trainer2thepros on Huberman Lab podcast out now.

stories.headline: Huawei claims 1.4nm chip breakthrough by 2031
stories.body: Huawei says it has made a breakthrough and expects to design high-end chips with transistor density equivalent to 1.4 nm processes by 2031.

stories.headline: Huawei pushing hybrid bonding innovation for chip scaling
stories.body: Huawei is pushing hybrid bonding to the extreme The success of their "tau scaling" depends on the HB contact acting as a damn good intra-circuit routing layer and not just package I/O. This is the biggest innovation here and what separates their tech from normal 3D stacking The vertical interconnects between the stacks generally act as the interface, but they have reduced the pitch so much that it can become a part of the timing path

stories.headline: Huawei claims chipmaking breakthrough to close gap with TSMC by 2031.
stories.body: Huawei says it has come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader TSMC, potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-25/huawei-touts-chipmaking-breakthrough-to-shorten-gap-with-tsmc?taid=6a13a877acead50001d7fc67&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: Hazmat emergency in Southern California with chemical tank crack and evacuations.
stories.body:
An unprecedented hazmat emergency is unfolding in southern California after officials found a crack in a chemical tank.

Fire officials say they've been conducting an all-night mission monitoring the overheated tank to see if the threat of an explosion has passed, as Governor Gavin Newsom declares a state of emergency.

More than 40,000 people are now under evacuation orders, @Max_Gorden reports.

stories.headline: Chemical tank crack prompts large Orange County evacuations
stories.body: A crack has formed in an overheating chemical tank feared to be at risk of exploding, prompting evacuations for around 50,000 people in Orange County, California.

stories.headline: Major chemical tank risk prompts evacuations in Orange County CA.
stories.body:
🚨 UPDATE: A major chemical tank is at risk of catastrophic failure in Orange County CA, prompting urgent evacuations across the area. 

Officials are scrambling to prevent a potential disaster.

This is serious. Praying for the safety of everyone in the affected zone.
